title: CREATIVE FPS
description: CREATIVE FPS⚡: It boosts your Minecraft FPS up to 3X or more for smoother and lag-free gameplay.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84bdcfd3a23e30e89278d58726cec4873c73209a.png)
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6fb2f7ff534d64bd6ef61094ba22e9360cccae_0.webp)
![FPS diffarance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8629b6f20abee881175f1b2cdc26af7e991baa4b.webp)
**CREATIVE FPS⚡Performance & Utility Modpack**

A powerful, lightweight client-side pack that gives a FPS increase of 3x+, added important visuals, and utility features. In addition to performance enhancement, it provides HUDs, which are customizable, cleans up visuals, provides camera tools, and smooths out the in-game controls while retaining the core vanilla feel of Minecraft.
